title: Xtra Crisp Spanish Mozzarella Croquettes
description: Umami rich and crispy Spanish dish featuring mozzarella balls, double fried to perfection, served on a vibrant talavera plate, this recipe is a delightful combination of flavors and textures, rajasic friendly and sure to please, with a focus on catalan cuisine and ayurvedic principles.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together flour, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs.
Cut the mozzarella cheese into small balls.
Dip each mozzarella ball into the flour mixture, then the eggs, and finally the breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Double fry the croquettes, first frying at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 2 minutes, then increasing the temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the croquettes from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the croquettes hot on a talavera plate.
Garnish with fresh parsley or chives, if desired.
